title: Vacancy for Category Manager at CarDekho Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Category Manager at CarDekho Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
Join the CarDekho Consulting Pvt Ltd family as a Category Manager in Rajkot. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About CarDekho Consulting Pvt Ltd:
CarDekho Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CarDekho Consulting Pvt Ltd!
